item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p07","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer immediately refuses to open another transfer channel, frames the request as repeated local routing repair after prior queue/entry/line splits, moves upstream to unified triage and responsibility boundaries, and proposes freezing new channels plus structural redesign.
